aeo_readiness.summary: Salt River Air has a decent foundation for AEO with structured content and service pages, but lacks depth in content and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Create a blog with localized, keyword-rich content to boost SEO and provide value to users.
Add customer testimonials and reviews to build trust and improve engagement.
Implement a clear call-to-action on service pages to drive conversions.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has structured service pages and a clear service area, but lacks detailed location-specific content.
gbp_analysis.summary: The website is somewhat optimized for Google Business Profile (GBP) with a focus on local service areas, but it needs more localized content and engagement features.
critical_issues: No customer reviews or testimonials are present on the website.
Lack of detailed, location-specific content for each service area.
No clear integration with GBP for reviews and business information.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on the website, but lacks citations on external platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile listing.
List the business on local directories and citation sites such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all external platforms and the website.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information
No Review schema for customer testimonials
No FAQPage schema for common questions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized, keyword-rich content and user engagement features
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed HVAC services in specific locations
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement a blog with localized content and customer testimonials
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop detailed, authoritative content on HVAC services and energy efficiency to establish the business as a local expert

page_title: A hand is holding a box with a price tag attached to it.
